response.justification: Despite a strong engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrable experience in agentic AI systems at scale, fintech infrastructure, or regulated AI deployment — core requirements for this role. His Google and Meta roles are listed with vague or irrelevant contributions (e.g., 'MCP code generators' without context), and his fintech-relevant experience is absent. His leadership experience is unproven at the executive level, with no evidence of scaling teams to 30+ or governing hybrid engineering models. His open-source work is impressive but unrelated to real-time credit risk or working-capital systems.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Experience with event-driven systems and distributed infrastructure
concerns: No verifiable production experience with multi-agent AI systems in fintech
Lacks evidence of leading engineering teams at scale or executive decision-making
No demonstrated experience in regulated financial AI systems or compliance infrastructure
